### 2141124
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E15 - Riffle the Whiffle**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:01  
⌛ April 8, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141124&mediaid=168fe118b1bf19c53e9b3bf39abaa39e1205144e) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/riffle-the-whiffle-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141124` mediaid=`168fe118b1bf19c53e9b3bf39abaa39e1205144e`  
_The Bears encounter a lost Whiffle whose only word is "Riffle." They have no idea who he is or where he came from. Dibble is tasked with looking out for him until they learn where he lives. At first delighted to have a new playmate, she grows frustrated when he seems only to want to get away. With the aid of the Bears, Dibble helps solve the mystery of who he is and where he belongs._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141124_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
